title: Make root provisioning resumable
description: Provision DAD1 before DRX2 and make root provisioning idempotently resume matching empty partial state without overwriting nonempty or mismatched records. Add deterministic failures at each write boundary and retry/open tests.
acceptance_criteria: Every write-boundary failure is retryable; matching empty partial states resume; mismatched or nonempty partial states fail closed; open requires both records; no deletion API.
